scenes.text:
If you have one source of income,
you are one decision away from zero.

The average millionaire has seven streams of income. Not one. Seven. A job is a single point of failure. If it disappears tomorrow, everything
goes with it. Building multiple income streams is not greedy. It is survival. It is intelligence. It is how wealth is actually built.

Start with one side hustle. Just one. Master it. Automate it. Then build the next one. Do
not try to juggle seven things at once. Stack them one at a time, like bricks.
scenes.highlight: Stack them one at a time

scenes.text:
Diversify your income like you diversify your
investments. Never put everything in one basket.
scenes.highlight: Never put everything in one basket

scenes.text:
How many income streams do you have?
Be honest. Follow for wealth-building strategies.
